popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description: When John Fisher was born on July 24, 1500, in Elstow, Bedfordshire, England, his father, SAINT, was 30 and his mother, Lady, was 25. He was married three times and had 15 children. He died on October …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fisher於1480年出生在英國時，他的父親John Fisher10歲，母親Christina8歲。他於1520年與Anna在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國肯特其斯塔波。

nameMeanings.name: Fisher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle English fis(sc)her(e) ‘fisherman’ (Old English fiscere). In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from many other languages, including German Fischer and its Slavic(ized) variant Fišer (see Fiser ), Dutch Visser , Hungarian Halász (see Halasz ), Italian Pescatore , Slovenian Ribič (see Ribic ), and Croatian Ribić or Ribar .

English: in a few cases, possibly a topographic name for someone who lived near a fish weir on a river, from Middle English fis(sc)hwere, fisshyar ‘fish weir’ (Old English fiscwer, fiscgear), or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Fisher in North Mundham, Sussex.
Irish: translation into English of Gaelic Ó Bradáin ‘descendant of Bradán’, a personal name meaning ‘salmon’. See Braden .

variants.name: Fischer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Gerhard, Helmut, Fritz, Klaus, Horst, Dieter, Franz, Ernst.

German, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle High German visch, German Fisch ‘fish’ + the agent suffix -er. This form of the surname is also established in some other parts of Europe, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, and the Netherlands. In Poland, Czechia, Croatia, and Slovenia it is (also) established in the Slavicized forms Fiszer (Polish) and Fišer (see Fiser ). Compare Fisher .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Fisher was born in 1480, in England, his father, John Fisher, was 10 and his mother, Christina, was 8. He married Anna in 1520, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He was buried in Whitstable, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fisher est né en 1480, à Angleterre, son père, John Fisher, avait 10 ans et sa mère, Christina, avait 8 ans. Il a épousé Anna en 1520, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Ilenterré à Whitstable, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Fisher 1480 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fisher 10 und seine Mutter Christina 8. Er hat 1520 in England Anna geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er wurde in Whitstable, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fisher è nato il nel 1480 nel England, il suo padre, John Fisher, aveva 10 anni e il suo madre, Christina, aveva 8 anni. Lui sposato Anna nel 1520, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Fu sepolto a Whitstable, Kent, England.

ko.lifeSummary: John Fisher(이)가 1480년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fisher(은)는 10세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina(은)는 8세였다. 그는 1520년 영국에서 Anna(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 켄트 휘츠타블일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Fisher nasceu em 1480, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Fisher, tinha 10 anos e sua mãe, Christina, tinha 8 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna em 1520, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Whitstable, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fisher родился в 1480 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени John Fisher было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Christina, 8. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna в 1520 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он был похоронен в местности уицтабл, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Fisher nació en 1480, en Inglaterra, su papá, John Fisher, tenía 10 años y su mamá, Christina, tenía 8 años. Se casó con Anna en 1520, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Fue sepultado en Whitstable, Kent, Inglaterra.
